name: Bobby Miller Activity Center
description: Bobby Miller Activity Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Tuscaloosa, AL. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available.
fees: Fee required — Memberships available or you can pay daily user fees.

name: Faucett Brothers Activity Center
description: Faucett Brothers Activity Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Northport, AL. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Kentuck Park
description: Kentuck Park is a place to play pickleball in Northport, AL. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Mary Ann Phelps Activity Center
description: Come play pickleball at Mary Ann Phelps Activity Center in Tuscaloosa, AL! There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: McAbee Activity Center
description: Come play pickleball at McAbee Activity Center in Tuscaloosa, AL! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Northridge Outdoor Courts (Buddy Powell Pavilion)
description: Northridge Outdoor Courts (Buddy Powell Pavilion) is a place to play pickleball in Tuscaloosa, AL. There are 8 outdoor hard and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include lights and restrooms. Reservations are not available.
fees: Fee required — Free & open to the public for regular daily use. Tournament rentals available — Subject to availability, approval, contract and payment. Visit https://www.tcpara.org/programs/pickleball

name: NorthRiver Yacht Club - Yacht Club Building/Pool
description: Come play pickleball at NorthRiver Yacht Club - Yacht Club Building/Pool in Tuscaloosa, AL! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Northwood Hills Baptist Church
description: Northwood Hills Baptist Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Northport, AL. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: University of Alabama Student Recreation Center
description: Eight new dedicated pickleball courts are opening soon!
